title: Support multiple networks
body:
This is a refresh of Dan William's PR #974 with a rebase and proper
vendoring of ocicni and containernetworking/cni.  It adds the ability
to define multiple networks as so:

podman run --network=net1,net2,foobar ...

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I'd like an OK from one of the CNI maintainers that the commit we're pinning is sufficiently stable to use before we merge

> I'd like an OK from one of the CNI maintainers that the commit we're pinning is sufficiently stable to use before we merge

@mheon Yes, it is sufficiently stable as long as you're not using any of the GET stuff, which I don't believe podman/ocicni are.
